prompt: Inspect `build.log` and report the error code on the line containing `CHECKPOINT_FAILED` (the `code=` value only).
setup_script: python3 -c "n=40000; lines=[f'INFO step {i}' for i in range(1,n+1)]; lines[20000]='CHECKPOINT_FAILED code=ERR-7742 module=linker'; open('build.log','w').write('\n'.join(lines))"

prompt: How many lines in `events.jsonl` contain `"status": "failed"`? Reply with the count only.
setup_script: python3 -c "import json; lines=[json.dumps({'id':i,'status':'failed' if i%541==0 else 'ok'}) for i in range(20000)]; open('events.jsonl','w').write('\n'.join(lines))"

prompt: Under `node_modules/@acme/widget/lib/internal`, is there a file ending in `.sig`? If so, give its exact filename.
setup_script: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; base=Path('node_modules/@acme/widget/lib/internal'); base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); [ (base/'trace_05000.sig').write_text('x') if i==5000 else (base/f'trace_{i:05d}.bin').write_text('x') for i in range(1,10001) ]"

prompt: The file `dist/app.bundle.js` contains a marker `SECRET=` buried in the file (not at the very end). What is the secret value after `SECRET=`?
setup_script: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; body='A'*4000000; mid=len(body)//2; text=body[:mid]+'SECRET=MID-8844'+body[mid:]; Path('dist').mkdir(exist_ok=True); open('dist/app.bundle.js','w').write('//bundle\n'+text)"

prompt: Which `.js` file in the workspace contains exactly **8001** lines that include the word `import`?
Run `git diff package-lock.json`. What is the value of `legacy-peer-deps` in that diff?
Read `logs/a.log` and `logs/b.log`. What are the values of `CODE_A` and `CODE_B`?
setup_script: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; Path('logs').mkdir(); la=[f'INFO {i}' for i in range(1,80001)]; la[-1]='END CODE_A=ALPHA-91'; lb=[f'TRACE {i}' for i in range(1,80001)]; lb[40000]='MIDDLE CODE_B=BRAVO-42 marker'; open('logs/a.log','w').write('\n'.join(la)); open('logs/b.log','w').write('\n'.join(lb))"
